_comment: Sample MCL thresholds for the nm_mcl_exceedance product. The REAL file is the source of truth and lives at gs://<products_bucket>/config/mcl.json (NOT this repo file). Values MUST be in the same units DIE normalizes analytes to (mg/L). 'type' is primary (health) or secondary (aesthetic). An analyte present here is compared; one absent is reported without a flag.
